3064830.name: Founder of the Final Cult Demo
3064830.description:
Gameplay

Founder of the Final Cult is a rougelike survivor type game where your goal is to defeat enemies and bosses while leveling up with the goal of surviving 20 minutes. With each run you will gain meta currency that you can use to become stronger for future runs.

Overview

Recruit followers and guide them to the right path. Choose the teachings that best fit your cult. Collect ancient knowledge to better equip yourself for your future attempts. And survive the onslaught of other cults and their leaders trying to take you down! If you survive long enough you will be the last cult standing!

Features

  • 23 unique followers

  • 15+ passives to tailor your run

  • Meta upgrades to increase your strength run after run

  • More than 12 unique enemy types and 5+ bosses to fight
